name: Premium Private Tour
description: The ultimate private tour from Bali to Nusa Penida with a premium touch: cruise on a bigger boat, snorkel the top spots, swim with manta rays, have lunch at a stunning new restaurant, visit the iconic Kelingking Cliff by car, and wrap it up with Prosecco at a secret spot.

name: Almond Milk
description: Spend the day exploring Nusa Penida and Lembongan — epic snorkeling spots, lagoons, and up-close swims with majestic manta rays.

name: Yacht KF-13,5m
description: Powered by three Yamaha 250hp engines, KF-13 is a spacious and comfortable 14-meter premium speedboat with a flybridge, a sundeck with comfy matts, and Bluetooth speaker. Cool box table with selection of fresh fruits, water and ice, as well as towels and snorkeling gears (USA quality), fishing rods are provided.
